notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson. Noelvi Marte scores. Matt McLain scores. Dane Myers to 3rd. JJ Bleday to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base

notableEvents.label: P.J. Higgins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: P.J. Higgins grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryan Torres to first baseman Alec Burleson. Matt McLain out at 2nd. P.J. Higgins out at 1st.
